StmtSimple.StatementText:
SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue FROM tpch_sf1.lineitem INNER JOIN tpch_sf1.part ON p_partkey = l_partkey WHERE (
p_brand = 'Brand#11' AND p_container IN ('SM CASE', 'SM BOX', 'SM PACK', 'SM PKG') AND l_quantity >= 5 AND l_quantity <= 5 + 10 AND p_size BETWEEN 1 AND 5 AND l_shipmode IN ('AIR', 'AIR REG') AND l_shipinstruct = 'DELIVER IN PERSON' ) OR ( p_brand = 'Brand#22' AND p_container IN ('MED BAG', 'MED BOX', 'MED PKG', 'MED PACK') AND l_quantity >= 15 AND l_quantity <= 15 + 10 AND p_size BETWEEN 1 AND 10 AND l_shipmode IN ('AIR', 'AIR REG') AND l_shipinstruct = 'DELIVER IN PERSON' ) OR ( p_brand = 'Brand#33' AND p_container IN ('LG CASE', 'LG BOX', 'LG PACK', 'LG PKG') AND l_quantity >= 25 AND l_quantity <= 25 + 10 AND p_size BETWEEN 1 AND 15 AND l_shipmode IN ('AIR', 'AIR REG') AND l_shipinstruct = 'DELIVER IN PERSON' )

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CASE WHEN [globalagg1009]=(0) THEN NULL ELSE [globalagg1011] END

[dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[lineitem].[l_partkey]=[dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_partkey] AND ([dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_brand]='Brand#11' AND ([dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='SM BOX' OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='SM CASE' OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='SM PACK' OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='SM PKG') AND [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[lineitem].[l_quantity]>=(5.00) AND [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[lineitem].[l_quantity]<=(15.00) AND [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_size]<=(5) OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_brand]='Brand#22' AND ([dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='MED BAG' OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='MED BOX' OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='MED PACK' OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='MED PKG') AND [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[lineitem].[l_quantity]>=(15.00) AND [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[lineitem].[l_quantity]<=(25.00) AND [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_size]<=(10) OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_brand]='Brand#33' AND ([dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='LG BOX' OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='LG CASE' OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='LG PACK' OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='LG PKG') AND [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[lineitem].[l_quantity]>=(25.00) AND [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[lineitem].[l_quantity]<=(35.00) AND [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_size]<=(15))

[dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_brand]='Brand#11' AND ([dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='SM BOX' OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='SM CASE' OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='SM PACK' OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='SM PKG') AND [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_size]<=(5) OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_brand]='Brand#22' AND ([dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='MED BAG' OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='MED BOX' OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='MED PACK' OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='MED PKG') AND [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_size]<=(10) OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_brand]='Brand#33' AND ([dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='LG BOX' OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='LG CASE' OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='LG PACK' OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_container]='LG PKG') AND [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_size]<=(15)
